stemHtml:
Given the following information, calculate the centre of gravity of a jet as %MAC...

MAC Leading edge: 13.21 m aft of datum
MAC Trailing edge: 15.63 m aft of datum

Weighing of aircraft:
Tail jack: 3345.25 kg
Right main wheel: 19 720.57 kg
Left main wheel: 19 730.69 kg

Locations:
Center of gravity: 13.65 m aft of datum
Tail jack: 21.34 m aft of datum
Nose jack: 4.22 m aft of datum
Main wheels: 16.98 m aft of datum

options.a: Not enough data to calculate the CG position.
